title: nepeta lamiopsis
intro: Nepeta lamiopsis, also known as Nepeta govaniana or Nepeta lamiifolia, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae), native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health issues. Nepeta lamiopsis has been traditionally used to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Its herbal preparations include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used externally or internally to harness its health benefits, including reducing stress, improving sleep, and boosting the immune system.
